meta.title: 21st Century Sims: Innovation, Education, and Leadership for the Modern Era
meta.description: Hudson Center for American Seapower Director Dr. Seth Cropsey and Deputy Director Bryan McGrath joined LCDR Armstrong to discuss Sims, Armstrong's previous work on A.T. Mahan, and why continuing to evaluate the wisdom of these men is critical to America's maritime future. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
